title: triosteum pinnatifidum
intro: Triosteum pinnatifidum, also known as thimbleweed or cutleaf cowparsnip, is a perennial plant native to eastern North America. Its medicinal properties lie in its roots and stems, which contain compounds that have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of thimbleweed include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as using it as a diuretic. Thimbleweed can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
